feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Technology Platform
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Technology Platform Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Enabling Access to SAP UI5 Applications for Non-BTP Users
entry.content:
I have developed an SAP UI5 application in Business Application Studio (BAS) and deployed it to Cloud Foundry. The application is now visible under HTML5 Applications in the SAP BTP Cockpit. I would like to understand how users without an SAP BTP account can access this application. Specifically, is it possible for users created in SAP Cloud Identity Services (IAS) to access this UI5 application?

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: Are there open-source or cost-effective alternatives for deploying UI5 apps outside of BTP and Kyma?
entry.content:
Currently, I am running a UI5 app on the Kyma runtime provided by SAP BTP. While this setup works well for seamless integration with SAP systems, I am exploring open-source or more cost-effective alternatives for deploying UI5 apps outside the SAP BTP ecosystem.

Thanks

entry.title: Error in SAP BTP after Custom UI5 app deploy
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing issue while running custom Fiori UI5 app in BTP CF. It’s running fine in BAS preview but showing internal server error message after deploying the UI5 code in BTP CF.  Please suggest how to resolve it.

Error message in log file in BTP CF:

GET request to /7fc513a7-ec39-4d08-a074-c6a6f4933e81.comcfnote.comcfnote-0.0.1 completed with status 500 xs-app.json/routes/5: Missing required property: source

 

Thanks and Regards,

 Jyoti Prakash Das

entry.title: Can I extend the self-registration for SAP Cloud Identity Services
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I want to enable the self-registration for an application registered in our SAP Cloud Identity Services tenant. Activating the self-registration and adding some information available in "User Attributes for Access" is fine and working.

But, we also want the user to enter the "Login name" (which we use as SSO attribute). Unfortunately, we cannot add this to the self-registration form. As we only allow internal users we could probably call an API to determine the Login name based on the email address as this would be available in a central repository.

How can ensure that the login name is set on self registration (either by entering in the according form or by some logic) before the first real login of the user?

entry.title: Can't choose Cloud Foundry when create Project in BAS
entry.content:
When I create new Project BAS, if I choose Data source = Connect to a System, can't choose Cloud Foundry in deployment configuration.

As I created before I can choose Cloud Foundry.

Could you please help me to solve this issue?

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: Can we use SAP AI core to deploy the application through Docker Image and use the application from E
entry.content:
I have followed some of Tutorials of SAP AI core. But I am not getting the correct way to deploy the Application using Docker Image and use it later on via an Endpoint. 

I have Chatbot appliation. I have created the Docker compose file because it has two containers running on sideto make the application working. I have no idea how to deploy the application to SAP AI core and use an application via its endpoint.

Could anyone explain me this ?

entry.title: Condition using a String function
entry.content:
Greetings experts, I am trying to use the endsWith function in as a condition, but I keeping getting an error that says 'type not found for variable "endsWith" '. I have included the Core SDK to use the function.

What I am trying to do is that I am evaluating attachments in Outlook (using the Outlook SDK), and all the attachments that end with .pdf are the attachments that I want to process? But I cannot get the endsWith function to work and I cannot find any documentation that shows an example of this.

SAP Build Process Automation SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: Calling Analytics UI API from SAPUI5 Application on Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

We are currently facing a roadblock while implementing the following scenario:

Scenario:
We are working with SAPUI5 applications running on a Cloud Foundry runtime. Our objective is to call the Analytics UI API exposed by CALM from an application UI service hosted outside the CALM tenant.

Setup Details:
-Trust has been successfully established between the subaccount and the Identity Tenant Service.
-A destination using OAuth2SAMLBearerAssertion has been configured in the subaccount hosting the SAPUI5 application.
-Additionally, a trust destination has been set up in the environment.
Issue:
Despite these configurations, when I click the link to access my application on the BTP, I receive a 503 Service Unavailable error when attempting to consume the destination in the SAPUI5 application.

 

Shared Configuration Files:
The mta.yaml configuration (attached screenshot).

 


The xs-app.json configuration (attached screenshot).

 


Could you kindly provide guidance on how to resolve this issue? Are there any additional configurations or steps we might have missed?

Looking forward to your timely support and expert input

entry.title: Is it necessary to separate B1i application and database?
entry.content:
Hey guys familiar with B1i,

I am using B1 10.0 and B1i  1.0.  Recently I’ve encountered issues with B1i performance. The message log keeps reporting "XCE208 Resource is busy" error while handling the event message. It's not always but sometimes. I login the B1i server and it seems the integration service and SQL Server take up most of the memory, reaches to 90%.

I used to be a dotnet developer. In my book, it's always a good design to deploy the application and database to standalone server since they are both memory intense services.

So my question is  should I separate B1i application and database to different server? Is it risky or will be benefit for the B1i performance? It will be great if we have the answer from the B1 official answer.

Thanks!

#SAP B1  #SAP B1i

entry.title: Run NodeJS app locally using destination and connectivity services
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

lately I have been trying to create a NodeJS app using NestJS and the SAP Cloud SDK for javascript and deploy it to the cloud foundry runtime according to this example: https://github.com/SAP-samples/cloud-sdk-js?tab=readme-ov-file

I created a new service, generated the odata client using an edmx file of our on premise service and deployed it. 

The deployed version is fine: I can read data and consume the odata service. 
In local mode the destination fails. 

I found this blogpost telling me how to check the connectivity of my destination. 
Using the curl request results in this:

 

curl -v -i "<destinationName>.dest/sap/opu/odata/iwfnd/catalogservice;v=2/ServiceCollection?%24top=1"
* Uses proxy env variable no_proxy == 'localhost,127.0.0.1,github.com,.github.com,.npmjs.org,.yarnpkg.com,npm.sap.com,.maven.apache.org,.repo-cache.svc.cluster.local'
* Uses proxy env variable http_proxy == 'http://127.0.0.1:8887'
*   Trying 127.0.0.1:8887...
* Connected to 127.0.0.1 (127.0.0.1) port 8887 (#0)
> GET http://<destinationName>.dest/sap/opu/odata/iwfnd/catalogservice;v=2/ServiceCollection?%24top=1 HTTP/1.1
> Host: sd_orca_sap_ecc_akab.dest
> User-Agent: curl/7.88.1
> Accept: */*
> Proxy-Connection: Keep-Alive
> 
< HTTP/1.1 500 Internal Server Error
HTTP/1.1 500 Internal Server Error
< Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8
Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8
< X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
< Date: Thu, 16 Jan 2025 17:10:28 GMT
Date: Thu, 16 Jan 2025 17:10:28 GMT
< Content-Length: 75
Content-Length: 75

< 
dial tcp: lookup <destinationName>.dest on 100.64.0.10:53: no such host
* Connection #0 to host 127.0.0.1 left intact

 

I also created a .env file that should change the proxy settings:

destinations="[{"name": "<destinationName>","url": "http://<destinationName>.dest","proxyConfiguration":{"host": "127.0.0.1","port": 8887,"protocol":"http"}}]"

 

My destination looks like this:

The destination is created on subaccount level. 
After changing the destination i also called the reload request Andre mentioned in his blogpost.

My default-env.json and default-services.json files both contain the configuration to the destination, connectivity and xsuaa service I created for the app. The variables are created using the cf env myapp > .env command. 
I am quite sure the service is found. Removing the destination service from these files results in another error: "Could not find service binding of type 'destination'".

 

At this point I am very desperate in trying to start my app locally. 

Any help is appreciated, thank you already in advance!

entry.title: I'd like to configure the SAP Destination service to use a certificate issued by private CA.
entry.content:
Hello,

How can I configure the BTP to trust private CA so that I can use a certificate it has issued within the SAP Destination service?
I've already confirmed that certificates issued by public CA like Amazon can be used.
The Destination setting is as shown in the attached screenshot.

I look forward to hearing from you.

entry.title: Extracting Line Items from the a Document Template
entry.content:
Happy Monday Experts. I am working on an automation that will auto-approve invoices using a document template. I have create a 'skeleton' so to say. My current setup extracts fields at a Header field. But I need assistance with extracting field at a line item level. Basically I need a clarity on the approach, because various invoices have varying numbers of line items.

Therefore, I would to know if I show create line for the empty fields, that way it would return details should that space been populate and return blank if the fields are empty.

SAP Business Technology Platform #SAP Build Process Automation SAP Intelligent Robotic Process Automation

entry.title: List Creation, Population and Retrieval
entry.content:
Dear Maestros, I have created a List variable, but I am only able to Set Variable Value for the 0th element and only retrieve the 0th element, because my 'Set Variable Value' method only allows input of myVariable[0]. I would like to ask what I may be doing incorrect? 

SAP Business Technology Platform SAP Build Apps SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: Cloud identity service user created failed login to an application
entry.content:
After following the guide (https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-identity-services/cloud-identity-services/create-openid-connect-application) and having established a trust connection to one of my applications in cloud identity service  , creating a new user and assigning it to a group of type (usergroup and creating the respective rule in Conditional Authentication) for my application, when I try to login via default identity provider I get "
Sorry, we could not authenticate you. Try again."

Please note that with an admin account created I cannot  log in.

I also tried without creating the group but nothing changes.

How can I resolve this issue?

thanks,

Davide

entry.title: Unable to open integration suite using trial account
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am getting the error while trying to open Integration suite using my trial account. Attached the error screenshot.

Kindly help to resolve the issue.

 

Regards,

Niyati

entry.title: Migrating from SAP BTP CF subaccount to other CF subaccount
entry.content:
Hi,

We are planning to migrate our existing SAP BTP CF subaccount to other new CF subaccount. Please guide us, what are the steps / standard processes need to be followed during this process.

Note - Both the CF subaccounts (new & old) are under the same Global account.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: CPI - if function returns multiple values
entry.content:
the if function is returning always the true value and the false value together in the same context, which makes my target structure take the false value (as being the first value).

I could manage the issue with the following udf-script and mapping:

def void conditionalMappingSingle(String[] conditions, String[] trueValues, String[] falseValues, Output output, MappingContext context) {
    // Loop through the conditions and find the first true value
    for (int i = 0; i < conditions.length; i++) {
        if ("true".equalsIgnoreCase(conditions[i])) {
            output.addValue(trueValues[i]); // Add the corresponding true value to the output
            return; // Exit after finding the first true value
        }
    }
    // If no true value is found, add the first false value to the output
    if (falseValues.length > 0) {
        output.addValue(falseValues[0]); // Default to the first false value
    }
}

Using if (standard function)

 

 

using user-defined function:

 

Isn't there a way to solve it with the standard mapping functions?

entry.title: Sending files from different folders/directories at a time through single SFTP sender channel.
entry.content:
Hello SAPians,

I have a requirement where there will be 3 different folders in  AL11. I have to fetch files from these 3 folders at a time and send it to the receiver using SFTP sender channel. I have to send all this files at a time using single sender channel. If not SFTP, pls suggest the correct way.

Thanks in advance 🙂
SAP Cloud Platform, industry edition, client libraries SAP BTP, ABAP environment SAP Integration Suite Cloud Integration SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: Cloud Management Tools - Major Upgrade - Announcement - 22 February 2025
entry.content:
I received a notification email with the subject line ‘Cloud Management Tools - Major Upgrade - Announcement - 22 February 2025’.
I looked under ‘What's New for SAP Business Technology Platform’ to check the Upgrade content, but did not find any information that looked like that.
I would like to know the specific details of the Upgrade, as I need to explain it to my customer. Alternatively, I would like to know the URL of the page with the specific Upgrade content.

entry.title: CDS $metadata 8.6.0 locally vs btp based deployment
entry.content:
We have a CAP 8.6.0 JS implementation. Locally the $metadata look different compared to the BTP based deployment. We have an entity which is annotated : 

annotate CustomerProfile @odata.draft.enabled;

Locally the Fiori Elements based App has no ''Create" button while remotly deployed it works correctly.

When we compare the metadata then locally it is different compared to the BTP deployment. 

Is there a way to see or debug how the $metadata gets composed , meaning which settings/annotations from which folder/file and sequence are being used ?

Best, Mike
